entries.title: HackIndore 3.0 Organizer
entries.description: Secured three sponsorships by pitching to education companies and food brands, while leading the creation of promotional materials and outreach content. Managed on-ground operations for 150+ participants, coordinating logistics for 30 finalist teams and ensuring smooth communication throughout the event. Contributed to the execution of a large-scale hackathon with 300+ teams, supporting evaluation processes, assisting in final winner selection, and developing promotional and engagement content.

entries.title: Head of Internal Affairs and Skill Development, #include SGSITS
entries.description: Led the internal affairs and skill development initiatives for #include SGSITS, a student-run technical society. Organized workshops, coding competitions, and skill-building sessions to enhance members' technical proficiency. Developed and implemented strategies to foster a collaborative learning environment, encouraging knowledge sharing and mentorship among society members.

entries.title: Nomura KakushIN 10.0 Finalist
entries.description: Selected as one of the top finalists in Nomura KakushIN 10.0, a prestigious innovation challenge organized by Nomura Holdings. Developed a comprehensive solution addressing real-world financial challenges, demonstrating strong problem-solving skills and innovative thinking. Presented the project to a panel of industry experts, showcasing technical expertise and effective communication.
